race.comment: ANGEL PLEASE (1) progressed nicely at her second outing when beaten half a length in second after racing on speed. Is open to further improvement and looks a major player. BOMEN BABE (3) gets the chance to take much closer order third-up from the kind draw. Watch for sharp improvement. PARIAH FLYER (7) did her best work late to finish third at big odds when resuming at Wangaratta over 1000m. Good signs fresh so deserves a lot more respect this time. FIGHTING FOX (4) also found the frame at big odds last start, getting home strongly at Wagga. Will appreciate the added trip but will need a smart steer from the car park draw. APPLE EYES (2) made a sound return at Swan Hill but was less effective on a bog track second-up. Can bounce back third-up.
